    1. getBounds()

Interface Collidable

All Known Implementing Classes:
Bullet, ExplosiveBarrel, GameEntity, Landmine, Player, PowerUp, ShieldPowerUp, SpeedPowerUp, Trap
public interface Collidable
Defines an object that can provide a collision boundary.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    javafx.geometry.Rectangle2D
    getBounds()
    Returns the current collision bounds in world coordinates.

  • Method Details

    • getBounds

      javafx.geometry.Rectangle2D getBounds()
      Returns the current collision bounds in world coordinates.
      Returns:
      axis-aligned collision rectangle
